entities.name: BARLEY
entities.description: The crop for which a high-density consensus map was constructed

entities.name: CONSENSUS MAP
entities.description: A high-density genetic map constructed using DH and RIL populations

entities.name: DH POPULATIONS
entities.description: Doubled haploid populations used as reference for the consensus map

entities.name: RIL POPULATIONS
entities.description: Recombinant inbred line populations used as reference for the consensus map

entities.name: MICROSATELLITES
entities.description: Markers used as bridges to integrate populations genotyped with RFLP or AFLP

entities.name: RFLP
entities.description: Restriction Fragment Length Polymorphism markers used for genotyping

entities.name: AFLP
entities.description: Amplified Fragment Length Polymorphism markers used for genotyping

entities.name: GENIC MICROSATELLITES
entities.description: A set of 61 markers mapped using a fluorescent labelling strategy

entities.name: A/T LABELLING
entities.description: A fluorescent labelling strategy used to map genic microsatellites

entities.name: QTL
entities.description: Quantitative trait loci contributing to partial resistance to barley leaf rust

entities.name: PARTIAL RESISTANCE TO BARLEY LEAF RUST
entities.description: The trait of partial resistance to the pathogen Puccinia hordei

entities.name: PUCCINIA HORDEI
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes barley leaf rust

entities.name: DEFENCE GENE HOMOLOGUES
entities.description: Genes identified by homology to known plant defence genes

entities.name: TBLASTX
entities.description: A homology search tool used to identify defence gene homologues

entities.name: MICROBIAL PATHOGENS
entities.description: Pathogens against which plant defence genes provide protection

entities.name: RECEPTOR-LIKE KINASE
entities.description: A positional candidate gene identified within the consensus map BINs

entities.name: WIR1 HOMOLOGUES
entities.description: A positional candidate gene identified within the consensus map BINs

entities.name: DEFENCE RESPONSE GENES
entities.description: Genes involved in plant defence, including peroxidases and thaumatin

entities.name: PEROXIDASES
entities.description: A specific type of defence response gene identified as a candidate

entities.name: SUPEROXIDE DISMUTASE
entities.description: A specific type of defence response gene identified as a candidate

entities.name: THAUMATIN
entities.description: A specific type of defence response gene identified as a candidate
